title: Cocapn Public Repository Configuration
description: Validates the public repo config file (cocapn.yml) that defines domain skinning, modules, agents, and orchestration rules.

version.description: Schema version for the public configuration file.

domain.description: The domain brand this configuration targets. Determines default skin, terminology, and available modules.

skin.description: Visual theming and layout configuration for the domain-branded UI.

colors.description: Color palette for the UI theme.

primary.description: Primary brand color in CSS-compatible format (hex, rgb, hsl).

secondary.description: Secondary accent color in CSS-compatible format.

background.description: Default background color for the application.

surface.description: Surface color for cards, panels, and elevated elements.

layout.description: Layout configuration for the UI shell.

sidebar.description: Whether to show the sidebar navigation.

terminal.description: Whether to show the embedded terminal panel.

modules.description: List of module identifiers to load for this domain configuration.

items.description: Module identifier matching a module.yml name field.

agents.description: Agent availability and configuration for this domain.

available.description: List of agent IDs available in this domain.

items.description: Agent identifier matching an agent definition id.

default.description: Default agent ID to use when no specific agent is requested.

fallback.description: Fallback agent ID when the default or requested agent is unavailable.

orchestrator.description: Routing rules that determine how tasks are assigned to agents.

rules.description: Ordered list of routing rules evaluated top-to-bottom.

items.description: A single routing rule mapping patterns to agents.

match.description: Pattern or keyword to match against incoming task descriptions.

agent.description: Agent ID to route matching tasks to.

priority.description: Priority weight for this rule (higher values take precedence).

strategy.description: Strategy for resolving conflicts when multiple rules match.

domains.description: List of domain URLs in this fleet.
